title: Nanoliposomal irinotecan with 5-fluorouracil and folinic acid in metastatic pancreatic cancer after previous gemcitabine-based therapy: A real-world experience.
abstract: Nanoliposomal irinotecan (nal-IRI), accompanied by 5-fluorouracil (5-FU) and leucovorin (LV), is an effective and safe therapy for patients in whom metastatic pancreatic ductal adenocarcinoma has progressed after gemcitabine-based chemotherapy. Our aim was to evaluate the effectiveness and safety of a nal-IRI + 5-FU/LV regimen for patients with metastatic pancreatic cancer and gemcitabine-based treatment failure in the real world.
trial_name: Nanoliposomal Irinotecan with Fluorouracil and Folinic Acid in Metastatic Pancreatic Cancer After Previous Gemcitabine-Based Therapy
